title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Don't Allow is selected
scenario: Location permission dialog reappears in Find My Device screen after user selects "Don't Allow" during onboarding on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
When the location sharing dialog appears, tap "Don't Allow"
Navigate to App Settings > Find My Device
Observe the permission for location usage window that pops up with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options, with the Find My Device screen visible in the background
Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate again to App Settings > Find My Device
expected: After selecting "Don't Allow" on the initial location sharing dialog, the Find My Device screen should handle the missing location permission gracefully — either by showing a one-time permission request or by displaying an in-app message/UI indicating location is required, without repeatedly showing a pop-up window that obscures the screen.
